name: play_mode
description: Control Unity's Play mode and check editor status. The 'status' action reports both play mode state AND whether scripts are currently compiling — call it before scene-modifying operations to avoid losing work. Entering Play mode may trigger a domain reload — the MCP session will automatically reconnect afterward. Use 'stop' to return to Edit mode before making scene changes.

action.description: The action to perform. 'play' enters Play mode, 'stop' exits to Edit mode, 'pause' toggles pause while playing, 'status' reports play mode AND compilation state. Default: 'status'.
